steps.title: Spot the pattern
steps.content: The passage shows a consistent progression: words move from Indigenous languages (Nahuatl, Taíno) into Spanish, then from Spanish into English. This pathway appears in both examples.

steps.title: Identify Spanish's role
steps.content: D names Spanish's function revealed by this pattern—the “medium” through which Indigenous languages have influenced English. The other three either claim Spanish contributed to Indigenous languages, compare contributions not quantified in the text, or suggest equal adoption without evidence. That matches choice D — D is correct.
